name: RPlog_An_Unscrupulous_Undertaking_Atrocious_Arrangements_Pt_1
title: An Unscrupulous Undertaking: Atrocious Arrangements (Part 1)
summary: Aboard the administration deck of a Corporate Sector station, the cold ISB agent Corentin is escorted in to meet the irreverent VicePrex Zeak Oppenhiemer, whose casual disregard for protocol grates against the agent's rigid manner. After dismissing the crewman, Zeak makes small talk over the stim-caff machine while Corentin presses him toward business: the matter of acquiring captured Wookiees on behalf of Lord Thel and the Empire. Zeak reframes the transaction as a lease rather than a sale, drawing out that the terms -- and the price -- depend entirely on how the "property" will be used, room, board, and medical expenses included. Corentin, relishing the verbal fencing, deflects Zeak's probing about the Wookiees' fate with a wicked grin, insisting only that the accommodations will not require comfort. The two spar over disclosure and discretion, Corentin weighing how much his superiors' demand for secrecy will allow him to reveal as the negotiation takes shape.
